409.description: Email already exists in this tenant

post.summary: Login with email, password, and tenant slug
Refresh access token using refresh token (single-use rotation)
Logout — revoke refresh tokens and blacklist access token
Create a new tenant (Super Admin only)

get.summary: Get tenant by ID (Super Admin or own Tenant Admin)

patch.summary: Update tenant settings (Super Admin or own Tenant Admin)
Update tenant status — suspend/activate (Super Admin only)

409.description: Email already exists in this tenant

post.summary: Create a new user in the tenant (Tenant Admin only)

get.summary: List users in the tenant (Tenant Admin only)
Get user by ID (Tenant Admin or self)

patch.summary: Update user profile (Tenant Admin or self)

delete.summary: Deactivate user (soft delete, Tenant Admin only)

post.summary: Assign a role to a user (Tenant Admin only)

404.description: User does not have this role

delete.summary: Remove a role from a user (Tenant Admin only)

post.summary: Create a new course (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List courses (role-filtered: students see PUBLISHED only)
Get course by ID with sections and lesson counts

patch.summary: Update course (Instructor own course or Tenant Admin)

delete.summary: Delete course (Instructor own course or Tenant Admin)

422.description: Course has no sections or lessons

patch.summary: Publish course — requires at least 1 section and 1 lesson

post.summary: Create a section in a course (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List all sections in a course

patch.summary: Update a section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

delete.summary: Delete a section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

post.summary: Create a lesson in a section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List all lessons in a section
Get a single lesson by ID

patch.summary: Update a lesson (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

delete.summary: Delete a lesson (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: Get quiz by ID (students see answers without isCorrect)

post.summary: Add a question with answers to a quiz

patch.summary: Update a question (replaces all answers if provided)

delete.summary: Delete a question from a quiz

post.summary: Submit a quiz attempt (enrolled students only)

get.summary: List quiz attempts (students see own, instructors/admins see all)

post.summary: Create a quiz in a course section (Instructor or Tenant Admin)

get.summary: List all enrollments for the current user
Get enrollment detail (students see own, instructors/admins see all)

403.description: Forbidden — not course owner or admin

get.summary: List all enrollments for a course (Instructor own course, Tenant Admin, Super Admin)

post.summary: Update lesson progress for an enrollment (recalculates overall progress)

get.summary: Liveness probe — always 200 if process is running
Readiness probe — checks PostgreSQL and Redis connectivity

info.title: Pandalang API
info.description: Backend API for Pandalang EdTech SaaS multi-tenant platform. Provides authentication, tenant management, course management, enrollments, quizzes, and progress tracking.

x-tenant-id.name: x-tenant-id
x-tenant-id.description: Tenant ID header for multi-tenant routing

password.description: Min 8 chars, must contain lowercase, uppercase, and digit

tenantSlug.description: Slug of the tenant to register under

roleId.description: UUID of the role to assign
UUID of the role to assign
